sections.paragraph:
f.-

(1) prop. Infin. of the verb אָשַׁם, like אַהֲבָה, ·יִרְאָה Lev. 5:26 , מִכֹּל אֲשֶׁר יַעֲשֶׂה לְאַשְׁמָה בָהּ “of all that he hath done in trespassing therein.” Lev 4:3, אֲשְׁמַת הָעָם “like as the people contract guilt.”

(2) fault, guilt, 1Ch 21:3 2Ch 24:18 28:13 Amo 8:14, אַשְׁמַת שֹׁמְרֹון “the guilt of Samaria,” for its idols. Pl. אֲשָׁמֹות 2Ch 28:10 Psa 69:6.

(3) the offering of a victim for guilt, or trespass. Lev. 5:24 , בְּיֹום אַשְׁמָתֹו “in the day of the offering of his sacrifice.” Comp. אָשֵׁם No. 2 and אֲפֻדָּה.
